title: Material Class
description: Schema for a material class record. Defines a taxonomy classification by composition or application method for Division 07 building envelope materials.

class_id.description: Unique identifier for this material class.

name.description: Human-readable name for this material class.

primary_material_class.description: Primary material class from shared taxonomy.

description.description: Detailed description of this material class.

typical_control_layers.description: Control layer IDs this class typically serves.

typical_forms.description: Physical forms typically available for this class.
